title: Email File from Monday Doc Column
excerpt: I love the Monday Docs column and the ability to create a template that includes dynamic values from the board. It’d be even better if we could make it possible to email that doc as a PDF with the mass emailing feature i…

posts.author: KassidyH (Kassidy Hancey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the Monday Docs column and the ability to create a template that includes dynamic values from the board. It’d be even better if we could make it possible to email that doc as a PDF with the mass emailing feature in the CRM.
I know you can add docs to the files column, even Monday Docs, but unfortunately you can’t include dynamic values unless the doc is sourced from the monday docs column.

This could be great for invoices, receipts, quotes (with more customization options than the current invoices & quotes features allows), but also I could see endless possibilities to send employees detailed docs with their information and other use cases.
